'''鈭歯g-t-y-h''' ('''kangatyehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbishop|unbishop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbishop|unbishop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-t-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kangatyehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingatyehoko|thingatyehoko]] || [[word:jingatyehoko|jingatyehoko]] || [[word:shingatyehoko|shingatyehoko]] || [[word:kingatyehoko|kingatyehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungatyehoko|thuthungatyehoko]] || [[word:jujungatyehoko|jujungatyehoko]] || [[word:shushungatyehoko|shushungatyehoko]] || [[word:kukungatyehoko|kukungatyehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatyehoko|thongatyehoko]] || [[word:jongatyehoko|jongatyehoko]] || [[word:shongatyehoko|shongatyehoko]] || [[word:kongatyehoko|kongatyehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngatyehoko|th忙ngatyehoko]] || [[word:j忙ngatyehoko|j忙ngatyehoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngatyehoko|sh忙ngatyehoko]] || [[word:k忙ngatyehoko|k忙ngatyehoko]]
|-

|-
